channel.title: CRA Intelligence Briefing
channel.description: Daily and weekly AI-generated podcasts covering credit rating agency industry developments, regulatory news, and risk management insights. Produced via Google NotebookLM from curated intelligence briefings.
channel.itunes:author: CRA Intelligence Briefing

item.title: CRA Daily Briefing — Essentials — March 17, 2026
item.description: Daily CRA intelligence briefing for March 17, 2026. Essentials edition: accessible overview for listeners building their understanding of the credit rating industry.

item.title: CRA Daily Briefing — Expert — March 17, 2026
item.description: Daily CRA intelligence briefing for March 17, 2026. Expert edition: advanced analysis for senior CRA risk management professionals.

item.title: CRA Daily Briefing — Essentials — March 18, 2026
item.description: Daily CRA intelligence briefing for March 18, 2026. Essentials edition: comprehensive credit news coverage with accessible explanation for listeners building their understanding of the credit rating industry.

item.title: CRA Daily Briefing — Expert — March 18, 2026
item.description: Daily CRA intelligence briefing for March 18, 2026. Expert edition: comprehensive credit news coverage with risk management analysis for senior CRA professionals.

item.title: CRA Daily Briefing — Essentials — March 19, 2026
item.description: Daily CRA intelligence briefing for March 19, 2026. Essentials edition: comprehensive credit news coverage with accessible explanation for listeners building their understanding of the credit rating industry.

item.title: CRA Daily Briefing — Expert — March 19, 2026
item.description: Daily CRA intelligence briefing for March 19, 2026. Expert edition: comprehensive credit news coverage with risk management analysis for senior CRA professionals.

item.title: CRA Weekly Recap — Essentials — March 21, 2026
item.description: Weekly CRA intelligence recap for the week ending March 21, 2026. Essentials edition: full week in review with accessible explanation.

item.title: CRA Weekly Recap — Expert — March 21, 2026
item.description: Weekly CRA intelligence recap for the week ending March 21, 2026. Expert edition: full week risk management analysis.

item.title: CRA Briefing — Monday Week Ahead — Essentials — March 23, 2026
item.description: Monday week-ahead briefing for March 23, 2026. Essentials edition: key recent news and what to watch this week, explained accessibly.

item.title: CRA Briefing — Monday Week Ahead — Expert — March 23, 2026
item.description: Monday week-ahead briefing for March 23, 2026. Expert edition: risk management lens on the week ahead.

item.title: CRA Briefing — Thursday Check-In — Essentials — March 26, 2026
item.description: Thursday mid-week check-in for March 26, 2026. Essentials edition: comprehensive coverage of the week so far, explained accessibly.

item.title: CRA Briefing — Thursday Check-In — Expert — March 26, 2026
item.description: Thursday mid-week check-in for March 26, 2026. Expert edition: risk management analysis of the week so far.

item.title: CRA Weekly Recap — Essentials — March 28, 2026
item.description: Weekly CRA intelligence recap for the week ending March 28, 2026. Essentials edition: full week in review with accessible explanation.

item.description: Weekly CRA intelligence recap for the week ending March 28, 2026. Expert edition: full week risk management analysis.

item.description: Monday week-ahead briefing for March 30, 2026. Essentials edition: key recent news and what to watch this week, explained accessibly.

item.description: Monday week-ahead briefing for March 30, 2026. Expert edition: risk management lens on the week ahead.

item.description: Thursday mid-week check-in for April 02, 2026. Expert edition: risk management analysis of the week so far.

item.title: CRA Briefing — Monday Week Ahead — Credit Markets — April 06, 2026
item.description: Monday week-ahead Credit Markets Edition for April 06, 2026. Key recent credit market developments and what to watch this week.

item.title: CRA Briefing — Monday Week Ahead — Credit Risk — April 06, 2026
item.description: Monday week-ahead Credit Risk Edition for April 06, 2026. Risk management lens on recent developments and the week ahead, for senior risk professionals at mid-size NRSROs.

item.title: CRA Briefing — Thursday Check-In — Credit Markets — April 09, 2026
item.description: Thursday mid-week Credit Markets Edition for April 09, 2026. Credit market developments since Monday and what they mean.

item.title: CRA Briefing — Thursday Check-In — Credit Risk — April 09, 2026
item.description: Thursday mid-week Credit Risk Edition for April 09, 2026. Risk management analysis of developments since Monday, for senior risk professionals at mid-size NRSROs.

item.title: CRA Weekly Recap — Credit Markets — April 11, 2026
item.description: Weekly Credit Markets Edition for the week ending April 11, 2026. Synthesis of the week's most significant credit market and CRA industry developments, organized by theme.

item.title: CRA Weekly Recap — Credit Risk — April 11, 2026
item.description: Weekly Credit Risk Edition for the week ending April 11, 2026. Risk management synthesis of the week's developments, for senior risk professionals at mid-size NRSROs.

item.title: CRA Briefing — Monday Week Ahead — Credit Markets — April 13, 2026
item.description: Monday week-ahead Credit Markets Edition for April 13, 2026. Key recent credit market developments and what to watch this week.
